Current selection
/docs

Binary resources open in popup sessions and expose the existing download action through shell commands.

Main surface

Primary document tabs stay central while the inspector and utility details live in the resizable right panel.

No documents are open
PHASE 3.5
Popup overlays and calmer shell chrome

The shell reopened the browser-managed workspace, rebuilt the local command registry, restored the resizable shell rails, and kept popup sessions separate from the main document strip.

Deterministic resource badges stay compact across the tree, tabs, and inspector
Main documents stay central while the left tree and right panel resize within bounded widths
Binary and popup-ready surfaces open as in-app overlays instead of side-panel content
No plugin manager, r
